summary.lv: SAP ABAP izstrādātājs mazumtirgotājā Rimi Latvia — ABAP risinājumu izstrāde dažādos SAP moduļos (SD, MM, FICO, RE-FX) S/4HANA un SAP CAR vidē; nepieciešama spēcīga ABAP pieredze (t.sk. OO ABAP, CDS Views, RAP, OData).
summary.en: SAP ABAP developer at retailer Rimi Latvia building ABAP solutions across SAP modules (SD, MM, FICO, RE-FX) in an S/4HANA and SAP CAR environment; strong ABAP (incl. OO ABAP, CDS Views, RAP, OData) experience required.
